title: Venezuelan Flatbread
description: A crispy flatbread from Venezuela, perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: Mix warm water and yeast. Let it sit for 5 minutes.
Combine flour, salt, and olive oil in a bowl.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Let the dough rest for 1 hour.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Cook the flatbread for 1-2 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
